title: Sophie's Hypixel Skyblock Enchants
description: A resource pack that utilizes the Hypixel Skyblock mod Firmament to allow customizable textures for blocks and items to grant unique textures for Enchantment Books.
body:
This Hypixel Skyblock resource pack utilizes the Minecraft mod [Firmament](https://modrinth.com/mod/firmament) to create custom textures for all Enchantment Books throughout the whole of Skyblock.

### THIS REQUIRES FIRMAMENT TO WORK!!


Each book has a unique texture to differentiate from others, allowing for quick searching through inventories or chests to find what you're looking for!

This resource pack is easily customizable (and I recommend doing so!), and you might get a basic understanding of resource packs if you choose to do so.  _I will put out a simple tutorial video to showcase what this pack has to offer eventually.._

Each texture is broken down into two parts, a coloured book background to tell you what type of equipment it applies to (blue to fishing rods, red to weapons, yellow for farming equipment, and more), and then an emblem generalizing what the enchant book is or does.

The following book is Smite, which then is broken down into it's two parts:
![a red book with a zombie head upon it, a red book to the right of it, and then a floating zombie head even further right](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5b300ff1615219bd3f760317ddba85d958aa6d4.png)

Known issues: Hypixel doesn't support enchant/skyblock IDs in the Bazaar, Hex, or Enchant Table natively.  However, in current Firmament versions, Firmament does support this in the Bazaar and Enchant Guide (though it can be a little finicky sometimes)!

Feedback would be excellent as well!  Don't like a texture?  Something's broken?  Tell me why in my [discord](https://discord.com/invite/BZp9q67wyz)!  Skyblock is always up to something, so a thing or two is bound to break or change eventually.
